title: ArcBio Continuous RNA Workflow - Pre-PCR Instrument: Part 1 of 4: DNase Digestion
author: Opentrons

steps.title: With this 4 part workflow, the...
steps.instruction: With this 4 part workflow, the OT-2 will follow [ArcBio Continuous RNA Workflow - Pre-PCR Instrument experimental protocol](https://s3.amazonaws.com/pf-upload-01/u-4256/0/2022-01-06/0h134y4/ArcBio_RNA_Workflow_Continuous.xlsx) to convert up to 96 input RNA samples into cDNA libraries. This is Part 1 of 4: This OT-2 protocol uses the RNA Continuous Workflow, Pre-PCR Instrument section of attached experimental protocol to treat input RNA samples with DNase.

steps.title: Mix 20 uL DNase Master Mix with input RNA samples
steps.instruction: Mix 20 uL DNase Master Mix with input RNA samples.
